title: Wee Geordie
writer: David Walker, Sidney Gilliat, Frank Launder
actors: Bill Travers, Alastair Sim, Paul Young
plot: Geordie is a very small boy who feels that the girl he loves is ignoring him because of his size. He decides to take a correspondence course in body-building. At 21, Geordie becomes one of the tallest and strongest men in Scotland.
